events_log.event: Martian day 25 has begun
A trading ship from Earth has successfully docked on Sol 25, delivering 100 units of food and 50 units of materials to the colony's reserves.
A severe sandstorm is underway on Sol 25, knocking all solar panels offline for the next 6 hours. Prepare for reduced power availability.
AI directive: Persistent Dust Storm Hampers Solar Output
Martian day 26 has begun
A significant solar flare has increased radiation levels by 50% for the next cycle. All personnel are advised to seek shelter immediately to minimize exposure.
AI directive: Increased Solar Activity Boosts Energy Output
Martian day 27 has begun
Sol 27: Subsurface ice located beneath the northern ridge. Water reserves updated—Irina +25L, Marco +41L, Zoya +36L.
AI directive: Solar Activity Boosts Energy Output
Martian day 28 has begun
During Sol 28's meteor shower, Irina Vale and Marco Quinn salvaged 30 materials combined. Irina also reported structural damage under ongoing -77C conditions with 64% solar activity.
AI directive: Mild Solar Activity Boost

Martian day 32 has begun
Exploration team located a viable underground ice source. Irina Vale extracted 34 units, Marco Quinn 32, and Zoya Kade 27 units of water for colony reserves.

Martian day 35 has begun

Despite the ongoing dust storm, a trading ship from Earth has docked successfully, delivering +100 units of food and +50 units of materials to our global reserves.

daily_event.headline: Moderate Solar Boost Enhances Energy Output
daily_event.summary: Solar activity remains high at 94%, providing a modest increase in energy generation across all colonies.

missions.title: Optimize Solar Panel Arrays
missions.briefing: With solar activity elevated, fine-tuning solar arrays can maximize energy intake.
missions.objective: Adjust and recalibrate solar panel angles to increase energy efficiency by 10%.

missions.title: Water Recycling System Maintenance
missions.briefing: Water reserves are moderate; improving recycling efficiency will sustain colony needs.
missions.objective: Inspect and repair water recycling units to reduce water loss by 5%.
missions.reward_hint: Preserve and increase available water supplies.

missions.title: Material Salvage from Old Equipment
missions.briefing: Materials are limited; salvaging unused or damaged equipment can replenish stocks.
missions.objective: Collect and process scrap materials from decommissioned hardware for reuse.
missions.risk: Risk of minor injuries during dismantling.

npc_transmissions.message: Solar activity remains high; optimize energy systems and maintain vigilance for any dust activity.
Prioritize water recycling maintenance to extend operational capacity during early spring.

ai.news_summary: Sol 40 on Mars sees continued high solar activity boosting energy production modestly. Colonies focus on optimizing energy systems and maintaining water recycling efficiency amid cold early spring temperatures. Resource management remains critical with limited dust storm activit…
